productName: Honey Tree - Live Resin Prana AIO - HTE - Maui Wowie - Sativa - 1mL
description: This sativa disposable carries Maui Wowie in a ready-to-go pen with the battery built right in — grab it, hit it, recycle it when it's done. Grab-and-go convenience, with notes of tropical, pineapple, and citrus, delivering an active, daytime spark.
